def positive_python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_item_info_log_in_batch():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_item_info_log_in_batch"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag info/debug logging per record in large batch processing loops."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
